translation.value: Name[COMMENT: default properties.xml; list header for any game object name - a game object is anything the user can interact with]

Operating Status[COMMENT: club properties; text indicating what status the club holds eg professional, semi-professional, amateur, this appears in the Club Details screen on the Team Profile so keep short and succinct]
Transfer Policy[COMMENT: club properties; text indicating any specific transfer policies the club holds, like only signing players of a certain nationality for example]

Club Culture[COMMENT: AREA: Club vision panel; SUB-AREA: Club culture sub-panel heading; FR-BN: 23335; TONE: Formal; CHARLIMIT: None; REF-ID: n/a; NOTE: Title string for the club culture section of the club vision panel, outlines the key objectives in the overall running of the club]

Manager Rules[COMMENT: AREA: CLub Properties; SUB-AREA: Manager Rules; FR-BN: n/a; TONE: Formal; CHARLIMIT: None; REF-ID: n/a; NOTE: club properties; text indicating any specific league manager-specific rules, like only being to manage one club per season in Spain and Italy]
